description_long: This town hall is a stately, rectangular building with a prominent central section and a tall, narrow clock tower at one end. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including numerous trees and flowering bushes, which add vibrancy and soften the formal architecture. The main facade features large windows and a grand entrance, likely framed by columns or pilasters, and is set back from a broad paved area that could serve as a plaza or forecourt. The roof is pitched and dark, contrasting with the lighter stone or stucco walls. Decorative elements such as cornices and window moldings are visible, giving the building a dignified, classical appearance. The grounds are well-maintained, with pathways and green spaces that invite public gathering and civic activity.
description: A stately, classical town hall with a central building, tall clock tower, and lush landscaped grounds featuring trees and flowering bushes. The facade is detailed with large windows, decorative moldings, and a grand entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and the full width of the building with its classical facade.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tall clock tower and the dense greenery surrounding the building, with the entrance less visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the building, more trees, and the continuation of the paved area, with fewer architectural details visible.
description_view_3: This opposite side view again emphasizes the clock tower and the lush landscaping, with a clear view of the side entrance and pathways.
attribute_architectural_style: Neoclassical with some traditional civic influences
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Decorative cornices, window moldings, pilasters, and a prominent clock tower with classical detailing
attribute_entrance_design: Grand central entrance with double doors, framed by columns or pilasters, and approached by a broad paved area; decorative moldings and possibly steps leading up
